summary: Completed another pass on Create Profile using only existing controls. GeneralTab now exposes User-Agent mode via ToggleGroup with proper Custom visibility plus Use Current/Refresh buttons. NetworkTab now seeds languages from the current browser, only fills template-based language options when available, and adds a built-in-button action to fetch current geolocation coordinates into the existing inputs. SecurityTab custom fonts now seed from template/browser data using ComboBoxTag and a Use Current Browser Fonts button. CreateProfileModal now expands Overview to show OS model, coordinates, fonts, proxy, security, notes, and keeps WebGL custom vendor/renderer randomized together. Payload creation now includes userAgent, coordinates, and fonts. Lints are clean.
current_status: Create Profile is significantly more complete: custom UA, current-browser languages, current-location coordinates, richer overview, and better WebGL/fonts behavior are wired in with existing controls only. Remaining work is runtime validation in the app to confirm every interaction and backend payload path behaves as intended.
